unitName: Let's Step It Up A Little
markdown:
# Vocabulary We've expanded the structure in this unit, so use these accordion sections for quick swaps.
Sizes

Use these after: Beag nó mór?

  • Beag (Byug): Small
  • Meánmhéid (MAYN-vayj): Medium
  • Mór (Moar): Large

You can attach them directly to the drink:

  • Latte beag (LAH-teh byug): Small latte
  • Tae glas mór (Teh gloss moar): Large green tea
  • Cappuccino meánmhéid (Kap-uh-CHEE-noh MAYN-vayj): Medium cappuccino
For Here or Takeaway

Swap into:

Anseo nó le tabhairt leat?
An-SHO noh leh TOW-urt lyat?
For here or takeaway?

  • Anseo (An-SHO): For here
  • Le tabhairt liom (Leh TOW-urt lum): To take away (with me)
  • Le tabhairt leat (Leh TOW-urt lyat): To take away (with you)

You can answer simply:

  • Anseo, le do thoil. (An-SHO, leh duh hull): For here, please.
  • Le tabhairt liom, le do thoil. (Leh TOW-urt lum, leh duh hull): To take away, please.
Extra Items (Food)
  • Scónaí (SKO-nee): Scone
  • Ceapaire (KYAP-uh-ruh): Sandwich
  • Croissant (Kruh-SAWNT): Croissant
  • Briosca (BRIS-kuh): Biscuit
  • Fianán mór (FEE-uh-nawn moar): Large cookie

Example:

Ó, agus scónaí freisin, le do thoil.
Oh, ah-gus SKO-nee fuh-RESH-in, leh duh hull.
Oh, and a scone as well, please.

Late Add-Ons
  • Mil freisin (Mil fuh-RESH-in): Honey as well
  • Uachtar freisin (OO-akh-tur fuh-RESH-in): Cream as well
  • Bainne almóinní freisin (BAN-yuh al-MOAN-ee fuh-RESH-in): Almond milk as well
Waiting & Collection

Swap into:

Beidh siad réidh i gceann cúpla nóiméad.
Bay shid ray i gyown KOO-pluh NOH-mid.
They’ll be ready in a couple of minutes.

  • Beidh sé réidh go luath. (Bay shay ray guh LOO-ah): It’ll be ready soon.
  • Nóiméad amháin. (NOH-mid uh-WAYN): One minute.
  • Tá sé beagnach réidh. (Taw shay byug-nukh ray): It’s almost ready.

For identification:

  • Is é seo do chaife. (Iss ay sho duh KHAF-eh): This is your coffee.
  • Is é seo an cappuccino. (Iss ay sho un Kap-uh-CHEE-noh): This is the cappuccino.
Updated Prices
  • Seacht euro fiche (Shakht YUR-oh FIH-heh): €7.20
  • Naoi euro fiche (Nee YUR-oh FIH-heh): €9.20
  • Deich euro (Jeh YUR-oh): €10
Useful Structural Swaps
  • Dhá chaifé latte mhóra, le do thoil. (Ghaw Kaff-AY LAH-teh VOAR-uh, leh duh hull): Two large lattes, please.
  • Cappuccino mór agus mócha beag, le do thoil. (Kap-uh-CHEE-noh moar ah-gus MOH-khuh byug, leh duh hull): A large cappuccino and a small mocha, please.
  • Tae dubh mór agus latte meánmhéid, le do thoil. (Teh duv moar ah-gus LAH-teh MAYN-vayj, leh duh hull): A large black tea and a medium latte, please.
Extra Clarification Questions (Barista)
  • Beag, meánmhéid nó mór? (Byug, MAYN-vayj noh moar?): Small, medium or large?
  • Anseo nó le tabhairt leat? (An-SHO noh leh TOW-urt lyat?): For here or takeaway?
  • Rud ar bith eile inniu? (Rud er bih EL-eh in-yoo?): Anything else today?
  • Ar mhaith leat admháil? (Er wah lyat ow-VAWL?): Would you like a receipt?
